mapper.select:
SELECT f.friend_id AS friend_id, f.created_at AS friend_since,
m.member_id AS member_id, m.email AS email, m.nickname AS nickname, m.total_exp AS total_exp,
t.name AS representative_title
FROM friend f JOIN member m ON m.member_id = CASE WHEN f.member_a_id = #{memberId} THEN f.member_b_id ELSE f.member_a_id END LEFT JOIN title t ON t.title_id = m.representative_title_id WHERE (f.member_a_id = #{memberId} OR f.member_b_id = #{memberId}) AND m.status != 'SOFT_DELETE' ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM friend WHERE member_a_id = LEAST(#{senderId}, #{receiverId}) AND member_b_id = GREATEST(#{senderId}, #{receiverId}) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friend (member_a_id, member_b_id, created_at) VALUES (LEAST(#{senderId}, #{receiverId}), GREATEST(#{senderId}, #{receiverId}), NOW() )
